はぁ……ひとりで書類仕事ってのは、<br>どうにも気合いが入らないな……: *sigh*... Doing paperwork alone really doesn't get me fired up...
司令室で書類を確認しながら退屈でそう呟いた、<br>そんな時だった――:
I was in the command room checking documents when I muttered that
out of boredom. That was when—
――なら少し、相談を聞いてもらえないか？: ...Then, could I talk to you about something?
背後から聞こえた声に慌てて振り向くと、<br>平然とした顔のウィステリアがたたず:
Startled by the voice from behind, I spun around to find Wisteria
standing there, her expression composed.
び、びっくりした……。<br>いつの間にそんなところにいたんだ？: Y-you scared me... When did you get there?
ずっと前からだ。驚かせるつもりではなかったんだが……。<br>どう声をかけたもの:
I've been here a while. I didn't mean to startle you... Just wasn't sure
how to get your attention.
相変わらず怖い技術だな……。<br>で、何の相談なんだ？:
That sneaky skill of yours is still as creepy as ever... So, what did you
want to talk about?
ああ……その……私は普段から人目につくのが苦手で、<br>あまり目立たないよう、:
Ah... well... I'm not good in the spotlight, so I keep to the forest to
avoid standing out, but—
ウィステリアは恥ずかし気に視線を逸らし、<br>ほんのりと頬を染めて言う。:
Wisteria looked away shyly, her cheeks faintly reddening as she
spoke.
私がいることに気づかなかったらしく、目の前で同僚が、<br>いわゆる、あの……情:
Apparently they didn't notice I was there. Right in front of me, a
colleague... well, um... started... making love.
隠れてるウィステリアの前でエッチを始めたのか……。<br>そりゃ驚いただろうが…:
They started having sex right in front of you while you were hiding?
That must have been a shock, but... what's the problem?
その……それ以来、だな……同僚がしていたのと同じ体勢で……、<br>私が犯される:
Well... ever since then... I keep having dreams... over and over...
where I'm taken in the same position as that colleague...
しかもその相手が――いつも、きみなんだ。: And the person doing it is always... always you.
（俺とエッチする夢を、何度も見てる……？<br>強くて物静か、それでいてちょっと:
(She's been dreaming about having sex with me...? That strong, quiet,
somewhat mysterious Wisteria?)
多分だが……私が見たことのある男性器が、<br>きみのものしかない、というのが理: I think it's because... the only manhood I've ever seen is yours...
あー……そういえば、見られたことがあったな。: Ah... now that you mention it, I was seen once.
きみが見せたんだろう……！<br>あんなにじっくりと……頭に残るに決まっている！:
You're the one who showed it to me! Staring at it so intently... of
course it would stick in my head!
（それはつまり、ウィステリアの脳内が俺の股間でいっぱいだった、と）: (So basically, Wisteria's head is full of my crotch.)
気恥ずかしいような興奮するような、<br>複雑な気持ちに、なんだかドキドキしてし:
A complicated mix of embarrassment and excitement had my heart
pounding.
で……その、だな……。<br>具体的に、俺にどうしてほしいんだ……？: So... well, then... what exactly do you want me to do...?
まさか、と息を呑む。<br>夢の中で何度も犯してきた相手の元に訪れて、彼女が何を:
I gasped in disbelief. What could she want from me, the man who had
violated her over and over in my own dreams?
俺に……夢で見た行為を、してほしい、のか……？: You want me... to do what you saw in the dreams...?
赤面し、言葉すら出せないウィステリアだったが、<br>それでも誤魔化すことなくし:
Blushing furiously and unable to even speak, Wisteria still nodded
firmly without trying to deny it.
彼女の真剣な表情から、<br>夢についてはかなり深刻に悩んでいるのは間違いない。:
From her serious expression, it was clear that the dreams were
troubling her deeply.
改めて異性として彼女のことを見てみる。スタイルは申し分はない。<br>だが、野営:
I looked at her again as a woman. Her figure was perfect, but her
years of camping had left her with little feminine allure.
――分かった。<br>なら……来てくれるか。: I understand. Then... will you come with me?
ふと、思いつくことがあり、ウィステリアに試してみることにした。: I suddenly had an idea and decided to try it on Wisteria.
……着たぞ……これで、いいのか？: ...I came wearing this... Is this okay?
こちらがより興奮できるようにと渡した娼館衣装を、<br>ウィステリアは抵抗なく着:
Without resistance, Wisteria wore that brothel outfit I gave her to
heighten my excitement.
大人の色気が醸し出された黒のドレスにガーターベルト。<br>彼女の白い肌がより際:
The black dress and garter belt gave her a mature, seductive allure.
Her pale skin stood out even more, and I felt my excitement mounting.
